nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Amaziah, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

esv.text: Now the rest of the deeds of Amaziah, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

cnv.text: 亞瑪謝其餘的事蹟不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 亚玛谢其他的事都记在犹大的列王史上。
